query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, COUNT(l.id) as total_leads
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN leads l ON u.id = l.corretorId
WHERE u.role = 'corretor' AND (u.name IS NULL OR u.name = '' OR u.name = 'Sem nome')
GROUP BY u.id, u.name, u.email
ORDER BY total_leads DESC;
